description: Sholay (1975) - A multi-genre film about two mercenaries hired by a retired police officer to capture a notorious bandit. Sippy Films.
Simhadri (2003) - NTR Jr. as Simhadri seeks revenge against an oppressive villain. Vyjayanthi Movies.
3 Idiots (2004) - A comedy-drama about three friends navigating the challenges of the Indian education system while chasing their dreams. Vinod Chopra Films.
Chatrapathi (2005) - Prabhas as Shivaji fights for freedom against a cruel ruler. Suresh Productions.
Magadheera (2009) - Ram Charan as Ram Chandra seeks vengeance in his past life. Geetha Arts.
Lagaan (2001) - A sports-drama where villagers challenge British officers to a cricket match to avoid oppressive taxes. Aamir Khan Productions.
Baahubali: The Beginning (2015) - Prabhas as Shivudu uncovers royal heritage and fights for justice. Arka Media Works.
Baahubali: The Conclusion (2017) - Prabhas as Mahendra Baahubali avenges his father’s death. Arka Media Works.
RRR (2022) - Ram Charan as Alluri Sitarama Raju and NTR Jr. as Komaram Bheem fight British rule. DVV Entertainment.
Baahubali: The Lost Legends (2017) - Prabhas (voice) explores Baahubali's legendary tales. Arka Media Works.
